title: Xavar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Xavar''' was a self-proclaimed [[Fellowship of Kooroo|Kooroo]] mystic summoned to help [[Delrian/Legends|Delrian]] authorities deal with a prisoner revolt at [[Mine Head 37]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-08-XX -->''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'' {{1stm}}
